POST.description: Initiates the report creation process and sends an email with the current Bitcoin conversion rates.

suggested_workflow.complete_code_for_action_derived_from_th: async with aiohttp.ClientSession() as session: async with session.get(BTC_API_URL) as response: if response.status == 200: rates = await response.json() ... await send_email(report_id, email, report_data)
suggested_workflow.description: Fetches Bitcoin rates, generates a report, and sends it via email.

GET.description: Retrieves a previously generated report by its ID.
Retrieves a stored report using its ID.
